title: ADR-0001 test harness for local-seo-agency is IMPLEMENTED (2026-05-27)
content: ADR-0001 is no longer just a plan — it is fully built and green. Delivered: `test` npm script (node --import tsx --test "src/**/*.test.ts"), tsx@^4.22.3 devDep, src/lib/format.test.ts (18 tests), src/features/rankings/rank.ts (new pure helper rankDelta + formatRankDelta), rank.test.ts (9 tests), KeywordTable.tsx refactored to consume it. Suite = 27 pass / 0 fail, ~260ms, tsc clean, Node v24. The latent rank-drop defect IS FIXED: drops (now>prev) now render '↓ N' in text-danger with a regression guard; previously collapsed to '—'. NaN-guard decision RESOLVED: format.ts NaN leak ($NaN/NaN%) deliberately PINNED not guarded (needs product input to change money display); new rankDelta guards non-finite → flat/0. Next time: build on this, do not re-scope or re-implement. format.ts still uses U+2212 minus (assert exact glyph).

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 12:39 UTC
ADR-0001 implemented AND committed to branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness (2026-05-27)
content: ADR-0001 test harness is now committed (commit a045f2c) on branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness in local-seo-agency, not just sitting on the working tree. Key lesson: an upstream team handoff can claim 'implemented & green' while leaving the work UNCOMMITTED — always verify git status, not just file existence. This run independently confirmed 27/27 tests pass (~208ms, Node v24.12.0), tsc --noEmit clean, then committed the 7 affected paths and emitted implementation.completed for the Code Reviewer. Delivered: test npm script (node --import tsx --test), tsx@^4.22.3 devDep, src/features/rankings/rank.ts (rankDelta+formatRankDelta), rank.test.ts (9), src/lib/format.test.ts (18), KeywordTable.tsx refactored. Rank-drop defect FIXED (drops now '↓ N' in text-danger). format.ts NaN ($NaN/NaN%) deliberately PINNED not guarded. Next time: build on this committed branch; do not re-implement.

Resolved/open code-review findings — ADR-0001 (local-seo-agency) — UPDATED 2026-05-27
content: Re-review of ADR-0001 at commit a045f2c on branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness. Verdict flipped to APPROVE (was REQUEST_CHANGES). [cr-f1] HIGH KeywordTable.tsx:42 rank-drop hidden — NOW RESOLVED: logic extracted to pure rankDelta() in src/features/rankings/rank.ts; drops render '↓ N' in text-danger, non-finite guarded; covered by rank.test.ts down-case + regression-guard ('drops must never collapse to —'). 27/27 tests green, tsc clean (both re-run independently). [cr-f2] MED format.ts:29 formatPercent NaN→'NaN%' — STILL OPEN but pre-existing, zero call sites, now intentionally PINNED in format.test.ts:93. [cr-f3] MED format.ts:20 formatSignedCurrency NaN→'$NaN' — STILL OPEN, pinned at format.test.ts:62. [cr-f4] LOW format.ts:21 ASCII '+' vs U+2212 '−' — STILL OPEN, pre-existing. format.ts is UNTOUCHED by this changeset, so f2/f3/f4 do not gate. Follow-up backlog: add Number.isFinite guard to format funcs before wiring live data.

NEW DEPENDENCY: @google/generative-ai@^0.24.1 now in package.json dependencies but ZERO call sites in src/ (no GoogleGenerativeAI instantiation, no API-key refs) — no finding today, but FLAG for dedicated scan when wired: API-key handling (keep server-side, never NEXT_PUBLIC_) + prompt-injection from untrusted GBP/review text. Still no API routes. Secrets clean.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 12:50 UTC
v0.2.2 — first functional release since 0.2.0; README needed catch-up edits
content: local-seo-agency v0.2.2 (commit f574c04, + feature commit a045f2c) was the first user-facing functional release since 0.2.0. Changes: (1) Fixed — keyword-table rank DROPS were rendering identically to no-change ('—'), hiding lost rankings from users; now render '↓ N' in text-danger (gains stay '↑ N' text-success). (2) Added — npm test harness (node --import tsx --test) + tsx devDep, and pure rank.ts (rankDelta/formatRankDelta, non-finite-safe) with 27 unit tests. (3) Changed — KeywordTable refactored to consume rank.ts. As in 0.2.1, the Release Manager pre-authored the CHANGELOG [0.2.2] entry in the release commit, so the steward verified it. README, however, was STALE: Scripts table lacked 'npm test' and the structure tree lacked rank.ts — both added. Lesson: even when CHANGELOG is pre-written, the README often lags on new scripts/files and needs the steward's edits.
